tests verify:  - Hook flag configuration matches CoW pool specification  - Weighted pool math (computeInvariant, computeBalance, onSwap) matches WeightedMath library  - Normalized weights handling is correct Note: As of the test creation date, Balancer V3 CoW pools may not be deployed on Ethereum mainnet. These tests validate against the expected behavior from the Balancer V3 specification and the WeightedMath library used by both the original and ported implementations. When a deployed CoW pool becomes available, add its address to ETHEREUM_MAIN.sol constants and extend these tests to compare against the live pool.","errors":{"ZeroInvariant()":[{"details":"Most test_computeInvariant_8020Pool_matchesWe.details: This validates our ported implementation uses the same math as Balancer V3

test_cowPoolHookFlags_matchExpectedConfi.details: CoW pools should have:  - shouldCallBeforeSwap = true (for trusted router enforcement)  - shouldCallBeforeAddLiquidity = true (for donation control)  - All other flags = false

test_invariant_conservedOnSwap().details: This is a critical property for pool security

test_computeInvariant_5050Pool_matchesWe.notice: Verify computeInvariant matches WeightedMath library for 50/50 pool

test_computeInvariant_8020Pool_matchesWe.notice: Verify computeInvariant matches WeightedMath library for 80/20 pool

test_computeSwap_exactIn_matchesWeighted.notice: Verify computeOutGivenExactIn for swap math parity

test_computeSwap_exactOut_matchesWeighte.notice: Verify computeInGivenExactOut for swap math parity

test_cowPoolHookFlags_matchExpectedConfi.notice: Verify CoW pool hook flags match the expected configuration

test_invariant_conservedOnSwap().notice: Verify invariant doesn't decrease on swap (conservation property)

test_invariant_linearityProperty().notice: Verify invariant linearity property: scaling all balances by n multiplies invariant by n

test_math_withLargeBalances().notice: Test math with very large balances

test_math_withSmallBalances().notice: Test math with very small balances
